NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
A
To London Cannon Street via Woolwich
TWO
Tuesdays and Wednesdays only
TWX
Not Tuesdays and Wednesdays

d
Departure time
V
Stops to set down only
A
To London Cannon Street via Woolwich
MTO
Mondays and Tuesdays only
MTX
Not Mondays and Tuesdays
THFSO Thursdays to Saturdays only
TWO
Tuesdays and Wednesdays only

From Strood

NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
c
Arrives 3 minutes earlier
B
From London Cannon Street via Woolwich
MTO
Mondays and Tuesdays only
MTX
Not Mondays and Tuesdays
